title: Creeper Cats
description: This resource pack transforms all Minecraft cat textures into creeper-themed variants.
body:
**This resource pack transforms Minecraft cats textures into creeper-themed variants.**

Right now only ocelot texture and sounds are changed. 

In future i will add all cats variants into the resource pack.

![Creeper Cat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/245dbb4eda361b5ac21bc543e9e41fb223dc96e7.jpeg)
